body.raw:
{
  "type": "reading", // optional
  "subtype": "mcq_multiple", // optional
  "heading": "Renewable Energy Sources",
  "prompt": "Renewable energy sources such as wind, solar, and hydroelectric power are becoming more common as the world seeks cleaner alternatives to fossil fuels. These energy sources help reduce carbon emissions and are considered more sustainable in the long term. However, they also come with challenges such as variability in energy output and high initial setup costs.",
  "text": "Which of the following statements are true according to the passage?",
  "options": [
    "Renewable energy sources contribute to lower carbon emissions.",
    "Fossil fuels are more sustainable than renewable energy.",
    "The cost of setting up renewable energy systems can be high.",
    "Renewable energy output is always consistent and predictable."
  ],
  "correctAnswers": [
    "Renewable energy sources contribute to lower carbon emissions.",
    "The cost of setting up renewable energy systems can be high."
  ]
}

{
  "type": "reading", // optional
  "subtype": "mcq_single", // optional
  "heading": "Global Warming Effects",
  "prompt": "Global warming has led to a rise in average global temperatures, affecting ecosystems, weather patterns, and sea levels. Scientists warn that unless immediate steps are taken to reduce carbon emissions, these effects will intensify.",
  "text": "What is one major consequence of global warming mentioned in the passage?",
  "options": [
    "Decrease in global temperatures",
    "Stabilized weather conditions",
    "Rise in sea levels",
    "Improved ecosystem balance"
  ],
  "correctAnswers": ["Rise in sea levels"]
}

item.name: reading fill in the blanks result

body.raw:
{
  "type": "reading", // optional
  "subtype": "reorder_paragraphs", // optional
  "prompt": "Rearrange the following sentences to form a coherent paragraph.",
  "options": [
    "Technology has rapidly evolved over the past decade.",
    "This has led to major changes in how we communicate.",
    "Social media platforms are now a primary source of news and interaction.",
    "However, these changes also raise concerns about privacy and screen time."
  ]
}

{
    "questionId": "685c607a2239f464533947cb",
    "email": "Dear [Manager's Name],

I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to share a summary of the recent training workshop I attended. The workshop focused on enhancing our technical skills, specifically in the areas of web development, user interface (UI) design, and integrating new software tools into our existing processes. During the session, we explored the latest industry trends, such as modern frameworks, cloud services, and best practices for ensuring optimal user experience. I learned several advanced JavaScript techniques including async/await, closures, and promises, which will help me write more efficient and cleaner code. We also explored UI/UX best practices, emphasizing user-centered design principles such as accessibility, responsive design, and user feedback loops, which will help me improve the usability of our interfaces. Additionally, I learned about various APIs and tools that will streamline our development processes, helping to automate tasks and improve application performance. The workshop also highlighted the importance of collaboration between teams, especially between backend and frontend developers, which will allow me to work more closely with the backend team to ensure our products meet the highest standards. I believe that applying these skills will significantly improve the quality of my work and contribute more effectively to our projects. I’m excited to integrate these new techniques and tools into our development workflow, leading to more efficient project delivery and enhanced user experiences. Please let me know if you'd like any further details about the training or have any questions. Thank you for your time, and I look forward to applying these new skills in my role.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Position]"
}

item.name: get all multiple choice single answer

formdata.value: Repeat the sentence you hear as accurately as you can.w

Climate change refers to long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns. These shifts may be natural, but since the 1800s, human activities have been the main driver, primarily due to burning fossil fuels like coal, oil, and gas.
